description_long: This swivel chair features a circular seat and a large, round backrest, both upholstered in a reddish-brown fabric with a subtle woven texture. The chair is supported by a single, sturdy central metal column that extends down to a wide, round base for stability. Two circular armrests, matching the seat and backrest in color and material, are attached to curved metal supports on either side of the seat. The overall design is modern and minimalistic, with clean lines and a focus on geometric shapes. The chair appears to be designed for comfort and style, suitable for urban environments such as offices, waiting areas, or public spaces. The visible materials suggest a combination of metal for the frame and base, and fabric-covered cushioning for the seat, back, and armrests.
description: A modern swivel chair with a round, reddish-brown upholstered seat and backrest, metal frame, and matching circular armrests. The design is sleek and geometric, ideal for urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular seat, large round backrest, and two matching armrests on either side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the seat and backrest, as well as the curved metal supports for the armrests.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid, round backrest and the central support column extending to the base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the seat, backrest, and armrest structure from a different angle.
attribute_central_support_column: A cylindrical metal column, fixed, supporting the seat and connecting to a wide, round metal base.
attribute_seat_back_design: Large, circular, vertically oriented backrest, moderately high, upholstered in reddish-brown fabric with a smooth, unpatterned surface.
attribute_armrest_style: Two circular, padded armrests matching the seat and backrest, mounted on curved metal supports attached to the seat.
